Scheduled Maintenance

Planned Maintenance Window

We're performing scheduled maintenance to improve performance and reliability.

**Date:**

Saturday, 5 April 2026

**Time:**

02:00 - 06:00 UTC

**Duration:**

Up to 4 hours

**Impact:**

Intermittent downtime

Affected Services

* API Gateway (v2 and v3 endpoints)
* Dashboard and web console
* Webhook deliveries (will be queued and retried)
* CDN edge nodes (partial, region-dependent)

Not Affected

* DNS resolution
* SSL certificate management
* Billing and account portal

What You Should Do

1. Save any in-progress work before the maintenance window
2. Set up monitoring alerts if you haven't already
3. Check our status page for real-time updates during the window

 View Status Page (https://status.uplink.example.com)

Uplink Cloud Hosting - 99.99% uptime SLA

You're receiving this because you're an account administrator.
